notes: MediaBox 220x220, TrimBox 200x200 inset 10pt on all sides -> unset BleedBox falls back to CropBox -> MediaBox, giving 10pt margin (>= amount_pt 9).
Only MediaBox (200x200) is set; TrimBox/BleedBox/CropBox all fall back to it, so bleed==trim==media -> zero bleed margin -> bleed check fails.
DeviceRGB image (disallowed) at ~310 DPI on a page with adequate bleed and no fonts, so only color-mode fires.
DeviceCMYK image (allowed) at ~310 DPI, adequate bleed, no fonts -> clean pass. Implemented in MIC-148.

100x100 px DeviceGray image placed at 4x4 in -> ~25 DPI, below min_dpi 300. image-resolution is severity warning in frisket-default, so it appears in warnings[] and report.pass stays true. Implemented in MIC-149.
1240x1240 px DeviceGray image placed at 4x4 in -> ~310 DPI (>= 300), adequate bleed, no fonts -> clean pass. Implemented in MIC-149.
Text set in Helvetica (standard-14) with no FontFile, adequate bleed, no images -> only embedded-fonts fires. Implemented in MIC-150.
Text set in a subsetted TrueType font embedded via /FontFile2, adequate bleed, no images -> clean pass. Implemented in MIC-150.

MediaBox == TrimBox == 540x720, 72 pt off the profile's expected 612x792 (US Letter) on each dimension, far beyond the 1 pt tolerance -> trim and page-size both fail (error severity in the test profile).
MediaBox == TrimBox == 612x792, matching the profile's expected US Letter size within tolerance -> clean pass.
Boxes adequate, artwork extends into all bleed margins -> clean pass. Content-bleed check implemented in MIC-151.
Boxes adequate but artwork stops at trim -> content-bleed warning. Content-bleed check implemented in MIC-151.
Fast bounds flags gap; strip raster confirms empty bleed margins and emits bleed-margin-empty per edge.
Artwork into left/right/top bleed strips only; Tier-1 emits exactly one content-bleed on the bottom edge.
CMYK raster flush to trim with geometric edge lines; zero box bleed margin.
Uneven bleed boxes: adequate left/bottom, short right/top.
High-contrast checker corners at trim for mirror seam visibility.
Photo-like RGB gradient raster touching trim boundary.
CMYK paper white with overprint enabled on a filled path -> white-overprint warning. MIC-319.
Same white fill without overprint -> clean pass. MIC-319.
